text: Hello. Yes. Hi, this is Samantha with U.S. medical supplies. I hope I caught you at a good time. Okay. I'm calling about the continuous glucose monitor. It lets you track your blood sugar without pricking your finger. Do you have diabetes? Yes. Okay. Let me grab a specialist real quick. Hang on just a second. Hello. This is Mark from healthcare solutions on recorded line. How are you? I'm fine. Well, I've called you about a diabetic monitor and do you have diabetes? Yes. And do you would check insulin? Yes. Which insulin is that? Lantas? Humor log? No, but log? No, only. And that is how many times in the day do you check the Lantas?
